title: app_test.go conditionally skips all integration tests when bundled data unavailable
evidence: internal/app/app_test.go:18 t.Skipf("bundled data not available: %v", err)
suggestion: Use embedded test fixtures or testdata so integration tests always run regardless of working directory

title: Standings tool requires both competition and season; no way to browse all seasons
evidence: internal/app/app.go:319-320 — handleStandings returns error when competition or season is empty
suggestion: Allow omitting season to return the latest available season, or list available seasons automatically
